highlights: BTS comeback concert held in central Seoul on March 21.
Seoul My Soul Shop at Sejong Center reopened on March 23 with redesigned cultural space.
Seoul Arts Center Symphony Festival 'Connecting The Notes' scheduled for April 1 - April 23.
Kim Yun-shin retrospective at Hoam Museum (March 17 - June 28).
Park Chan-kyong: 'Zen Master Eyeball' at Kukje Gallery (March 19 - May 10).

stocks.market_sentiment: Volatile; market continues a 'seesaw battle' between rising energy prices (geopolitical tensions) and strong earnings from AI/semiconductor sectors.
key_events: Semiconductor supercycle optimism remains; Goldman Sachs maintains 7000 target for year-end.
Investors monitoring geopolitical impacts on oil prices and exchange rate (KRW/USD).
Recent market volatility (March 18-19) driven by oil price spikes and Israel-Iran tensions.
